member.name: T:SagaNet.Persistence.EfCore.Entities.ExecutionPointerEntity
member.summary: Database entity for an execution pointer (step invocation).

member.name: P:SagaNet.Persistence.EfCore.Entities.ExecutionPointerEntity.PersistenceDataJson
member.summary: JSON-serialized Dictionary<string, string> for step-scoped persistence.

member.summary: Database entity for a published workflow event.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Persistence.EfCore.Entities.WorkflowInstanceEntity
member.summary: Database entity for a workflow instance.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Persistence.EfCore.Repositories.EfWorkflowRepository
member.summary: EF Core + SQL Server implementation of . Uses optimistic concurrency (RowVersion) to prevent two hosts from executing the same workflow instance simultaneously.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Persistence.EfCore.SagaNetDbContext
member.summary: EF Core DbContext for SagaNet persistence.
